paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, representing an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close, but a 25.86 percent decrease over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as reports on the company's convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Retail traders have reportedly turned bullish on the stock despite its sharp selloff.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as filings related to the company's convertible senior notes offering. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings. A recent social post mentioned the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
